family_summaries.note: append-only traces remain the replay floor, but they are rarely the best locality or edit-cost design on the current workload set
delta traces win where changed addresses or frames stay reconstructable, but they refuse workloads that would hide semantic state behind opaque deltas
scratchpad layouts win where token-trace truth must stay exact but locality can still be reshaped safely
recurrent state wins long-horizon workloads only under explicit bounded-state publication rather than replay-complete claims
working-memory publication wins semantic memory workloads when slot and lookup semantics stay explicit and bounded

workload_summaries.note: module_call_trace currently favors locality_scratchpad as the best representation tradeoff on the seeded study because it preserves the relevant truth surface with lower edit cost than the audit-floor full trace.

symbolic_locality currently favors locality_scratchpad as the best representation tradeoff on the seeded study because it preserves the relevant truth surface with lower edit cost than the audit-floor full trace.

associative_recall currently favors working_memory_tier as the best representation tradeoff on the seeded study because it preserves the relevant truth surface with lower edit cost than the audit-floor full trace.

long_horizon_control currently favors recurrent_state as the best representation tradeoff on the seeded study because it preserves the relevant truth surface with lower edit cost than the audit-floor full trace.

byte_memory_loop currently favors working_memory_tier as the best representation tradeoff on the seeded study because it preserves the relevant truth surface with lower edit cost than the audit-floor full trace.

claim_boundary: this eval report compares representation designs on the same workloads while keeping replay posture and refusal thresholds explicit. It does not promote the recommended design for one workload into a broad executor or product claim
summary: State-design study report now joins contract dataset://openagents/tassadar/state_design_study, publication tassadar.state_design_study.publication.v1, and runtime tassadar.state_design.runtime_report.v1 across 5 design families and 5 workload families.
